headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Southwest Airlines, Raises Price Target to $65
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Ravi Shanker   maintains Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $60 to $65.

headline: Raymond James Maintains Outperform on Southwest Airlines, Raises Price Target to $60
